name: spbu-ops-dashboard
description: Putra Laskar Indonesia Dashboard untuk stock, pompa, rekonsiliasi, dan pelaporan.

scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @spbu/contracts && npm run clean --workspace @spbu/api && npm run clean --workspace @spbu/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @spbu/contracts && npm run build:self --workspace @spbu/api && npm run build:self --workspace @spbu/web
scripts.check: npm run build --workspace @spbu/contracts && npm run check --workspace @spbu/api && npm run check --workspace @spbu/web && node --check api/gateway.mjs && node --check scripts/vercelRoute.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @spbu/contracts && npm run test --workspace @spbu/api && npm run test:vercel-routing
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace @spbu/contracts && npm run test:coverage --workspace @spbu/api
scripts.quality: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:vercel-routing && npm run test:browser-compat && npm run build && npm run verify:browser-bundle
